text: I am standing in a modern, well-lit corridor, my attention drawn to the R+D exhibit within glass walls. The space exudes a sense of curiosity and anticipation. As I absorb the words on the wall—descriptions of workshops and the energy of creation—I feel a surge of inspiration. The environment compels me to imagine, to tinker, to question. I am moved by an undercurrent of almost childlike excitement: here, anything might be possible, and invention feels within reach. There is safety in the order of technology and wonder in the unknowns waiting beyond the glass.
